narrative:
Precinct Windham Twp B (precinct in Portage County) has 656 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
